display_information.name: DeepReplyBot
display_information.description: AI-powered LinkedIn reply drafting and lead qualification with Slack approval workflows
display_information.long_description: DeepReplyBot drafts AI-generated LinkedIn and email replies, then posts them to Slack for human review. Reps can approve, edit, or reject each reply with a single click. Approved replies are sent after a 60-second undo window. The bot also posts qualified inbound leads with ICP scoring breakdowns.
